headline: Guggenheim Trims PT on Accenture (ACN) Amid Industry-Wide Multiple Compression
summary: Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN) earns a place on our 13 stocks with consistent growth to buy right now. Recently, there has been a slight shift in analyst sentiment for Accenture plc (NYSE:ACN). On March 11, 2026, Guggenheim Partners’ Jonathan Lee reduced the firm’s price target for Accenture from $305 to $275 while keeping a Buy rating. […]
